words.word: Без труда не выловишь и рыбку из пруда
words.reading: Bez truda ne vylovish i rybku iz pruda
words.meaning: No pain, no gain (lit: Without effort you won't catch a fish from a pond)
words.example: Хочешь выучить язык? Без труда не выловишь и рыбку из пруда — занимайся каждый день.
words.exampleMeaning: Want to learn a language? No pain, no gain — study every day.

words.meaning: Practice makes perfect (lit: Repetition is the mother of learning)
words.example: Повтори слова ещё раз. Повторение — мать учения.
words.exampleMeaning: Repeat the words one more time. Practice makes perfect.

words.meaning: Live and learn (lit: Live a century, learn a century)
words.example: В восемьдесят лет он начал учить китайский. Век живи — век учись!
words.exampleMeaning: At eighty he started learning Chinese. Live and learn!

words.meaning: Sleep on it (lit: Morning is wiser than evening)
words.example: Не принимай решение сейчас. Утро вечера мудренее.
words.exampleMeaning: Don't make a decision now. Sleep on it.

words.word: Не всё то золото, что блестит
words.reading: Ne vsyo to zoloto, chto blestit
words.meaning: All that glitters is not gold
words.example: Эта работа кажется идеальной, но не всё то золото, что блестит.
words.exampleMeaning: This job seems perfect, but all that glitters is not gold.

words.meaning: Slow and steady wins the race (lit: Drive quieter, you'll go further)
words.example: Не торопись с проектом. Тише едешь — дальше будешь.
words.exampleMeaning: Don't rush the project. Slow and steady wins the race.

words.word: Семь раз отмерь, один раз отрежь
words.reading: Sem raz otmer, odin raz otrezh
words.meaning: Measure twice, cut once (lit: Measure seven times, cut once)
words.example: Прежде чем подписать контракт, проверь всё. Семь раз отмерь, один раз отрежь.
words.exampleMeaning: Before signing the contract, check everything. Measure twice, cut once.

words.meaning: A friend in need is a friend indeed (lit: Friends are known in trouble)
words.example: Когда я заболел, только Маша помогла мне. Друзья познаются в беде.
words.exampleMeaning: When I got sick, only Masha helped me. A friend in need is a friend indeed.

words.example: Ты наконец начал заниматься спортом? Лучше поздно, чем никогда!
words.exampleMeaning: You finally started exercising? Better late than never!

words.word: На вкус и цвет товарищей нет
words.reading: Na vkus i tsvet tovarishchey net
words.meaning: There's no accounting for taste (lit: In taste and color there are no comrades)
words.example: Тебе нравится эта музыка? Ну, на вкус и цвет товарищей нет.
words.exampleMeaning: You like this music? Well, there's no accounting for taste.

words.meaning: The apple doesn't fall far from the tree
words.example: Он стал врачом, как и его отец. Яблоко от яблони недалеко падает.
words.exampleMeaning: He became a doctor, just like his father. The apple doesn't fall far from the tree.

words.word: В гостях хорошо, а дома лучше
words.reading: V gostyakh khorosho, a doma luchshe
words.meaning: There's no place like home (lit: It's good visiting, but home is better)
words.example: Отпуск был отличный, но в гостях хорошо, а дома лучше.
words.exampleMeaning: The vacation was great, but there's no place like home.

words.word: Кто рано встаёт, тому Бог подаёт
words.reading: Kto rano vstayot, tomu Bog podayot
words.meaning: The early bird catches the worm (lit: God gives to those who wake up early)
words.example: Вставай пораньше! Кто рано встаёт, тому Бог подаёт.
words.exampleMeaning: Get up earlier! The early bird catches the worm.

words.word: Не имей сто рублей, а имей сто друзей
words.reading: Ne imey sto rubley, a imey sto druzey
words.meaning: A friend is worth more than money (lit: Don't have a hundred rubles, have a hundred friends)
words.example: Друзья помогли ему найти работу. Не имей сто рублей, а имей сто друзей.
words.exampleMeaning: Friends helped him find a job. A friend is worth more than money.

words.meaning: Speech is silver, silence is golden
words.example: Иногда лучше промолчать. Слово — серебро, молчание — золото.
words.exampleMeaning: Sometimes it's better to stay silent. Speech is silver, silence is golden.

words.meaning: One man is no warrior — teamwork matters (lit: One person in the field is not a warrior)
words.example: Давайте работать вместе. Один в поле не воин.
words.exampleMeaning: Let's work together. One man is no warrior.

items.sentence: Вставай пораньше! Кто рано встаёт, тому ___.

items.question: What does 'Без труда не выловишь и рыбку из пруда' mean?
Which proverb means 'The apple doesn't fall far from the tree'?
What does 'Слово — серебро, молчание — золото' advise?
options: Silence is often better than speaking
Money is more important than words
